guide_review_response.work_item: 2.5.v2 (functional verification of canonical 7 PS1 + McpConfigPath derivation)

reviewing.ea_work: 2.5.v2 verification probe + 20/20 PASS evidence + v4 handoff recommendation

guide_review_response.summary:
Independent disk verification confirms 2.5.v2 work is clean and the v4 handoff recommendation is correctly timed. Invariants HOLD: HEAD = 9d17e7f (zero new commits — single-commit-at-2.9 discipline intact); stash@{0} byte-identical timestamp 20260424_013002; state.json fleet_paused=true with original reason and last_updated_by/utc preserved; pytest tools/ confirms 282 passed (matches EA-4 claim; zero regression). Two new untracked artifacts in git status (now 32 entries, was 30): scripts/verify_25_v2.ps1 (the AST-driven probe) and docs/platform_separation/ea_outputs/EA_2.5.v2_VERIFICATION_EVIDENCE.txt (probe stdout capture showing ALL_GREEN 20/20).
The probe methodology is rigorous and reproducible: PowerShell AST parser [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile extracts ONLY the primary RepoRoot/BlarAIRoot ParameterAst.Extent.Text (preserving [Alias()] + [string] type attributes + default expression), wraps it in a minimal single-param scriptblock to isolate semantics from peer mandatory params (Role on wake_launcher, Branch / TrackingTaskId / FleetReportsTaskId on la_merge_approve, etc.). Tests 3 axes per script (baseline → hardcoded default; env-fallback → $env:BLARAI_ROOT precedence; explicit alias → -BlarAIRoot 'X'). For agents-cadence-monitor + la_merge_approve (the 2 McpConfigPath scripts), appends `$McpConfigPath = Join-Path $RepoRoot '.mcp.json'` body and verifies derivation end-to-end. Env cleanup (Remove-Item Env:BLARAI_ROOT) between tests prevents cross-test contamination. Total: 6×3 + 2×1 = 20 checks; all PASS.
v4 handoff recommendation: AUTHORIZED. EA-4's honest budget self-assessment ("even slightly tight" per i1-4 trigger language) is credible given the substantial work this session accomplished: 7 of 13 Item-2.4 file refactors (including file 13 MCP server LARGEST single lift with full §D.1 hardening), f1 chokepoint helper fix, Item 2.5 (6 PS1 + 2 SKIP), 3 correction iterations (g5-7/g5-8/g5-9 + encoding regression catch), Item 2.5.v2 probe development + execution + evidence capture. EA-4 has accomplished significantly more than EA-3 did before emitting v3. Item 2.6 is structurally comparable to file 13 with 4 substantive deliverables (extended grep with 12 patterns + g5-4 legacy file disposition + D3 dashboard_maintainer:113 closure + observation o1 handler-guards-vs-VikunjaClient- routing decision). Per i1-4 + dn15 ("If a successor approaches context exhaustion before item 2.9, it MUST emit a v3 or higher mid-stage handoff XML ... NO partial-commit refactor. NO emergency single-commit attempts"), proactive emission at the 2.5.v2 → 2.6 boundary is the right discipline. The clean GREEN state (282 passed + all axes verified + invariants intact) is the ideal handoff baseline.
Action: EA-4 drafts v4 mid-stage handoff XML following v1/v2/v3 schema (docs-only commit, one file in diff, +X/-0). LA spawns EA-5 with the standard attachment set + v4 handoff + Guide-#5 EA_5 init pointer (which Guide-#5 will draft after EA-4 commits the v4).

independent_disk_verification.check: git log --oneline -1: 9d17e7f -- ZERO new commits since EA-4 began this turn. git status: 32 entries (was 30; +2 from new artifacts). git stash list: stash@{0}: ...wake_launcher auto-stash sdo 20260424_013002 byte-identical. pytest tools/ --tb=short -q: 282 passed in 2.45s. state.json: fleet_paused=true, fleet_paused_reason="platform separation v2 in progress", last_updated_by="copilot_agent", last_updated_utc="2026-04-24T20:46:12Z" -- all original values preserved (no resume call this session). Single-commit discipline (w13) holds; fleet pause invariant holds; stash invariant holds.

Glob "**/verify_25_v2.ps1" → scripts/verify_25_v2.ps1 (lives at BlarAI repo root under scripts/ — consistent with the existing convention for one-off research/test scripts per AUDIT_RISK_REVIEW Appendix A.1 out-of-scope classification of scripts/). Untracked (??) in git status.

Glob "**/EA_2.5.v2_VERIFICATION_EVIDENCE*" → docs/platform_separation/ea_outputs/EA_2.5.v2_VERIFICATION_EVIDENCE.txt. Untracked (??) in git status. Contents: the Format-Table stdout capture from probe execution showing 6 PS1 rows + final ALL_GREEN tally line "ALL_GREEN: 6 scripts x 3 axes (18) + 2 scripts x McpConfigPath axis (2) = 20 checks PASS".

Read scripts/verify_25_v2.ps1 end-to-end (95 lines): - Uses PowerShell AST parser ([System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile) -- proper structural parsing, not regex-based text matching. Robust against formatting variations. - For each script: extracts only the primary RepoRoot/BlarAIRoot ParameterAst.Extent.Text (preserving [Alias()] + [string] attributes + the entire default expression including the env-fallback `$(if ($env:BLARAI_ROOT) {...})` block). - Wraps the extracted ParameterAst in a minimal single-param scriptblock -- ISOLATES the env-fallback / alias / explicit precedence semantics from peer mandatory params (e.g., Role on wake_launcher, Branch / TrackingTaskId / FleetReportsTaskId on la_merge_approve). Otherwise the probe couldn't invoke the scripts without supplying all mandatory params. - Three axes per script: Axis 1 baseline: Remove-Item Env:BLARAI_ROOT; invoke with no flag; expect hardcoded default 'C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI'. Axis 2 env-fallback: $env:BLARAI_ROOT = 'C:\test\envroot'; invoke with no flag; expect env value. Axis 3 alias binding: invoke with -BlarAIRoot 'C:\explicit'; expect 'C:\explicit' (works because [Alias('BlarAIRoot')] makes -BlarAIRoot resolve to $RepoRoot on the 5 alias-on-existing-RepoRoot scripts; works directly for test_async_post_gate where $BlarAIRoot is the canonical primary). - For agents-cadence-monitor + la_merge_approve (the 2 McpConfigPath scripts): Axis 4 McpConfigPath derivation: append `$McpConfigPath = Join-Path $RepoRoot '.mcp.json'` to the probe scriptblock; invoke with -BlarAIRoot 'C:\test'; expect $McpConfigPath = 'C:\test\.mcp.json'. - Env cleanup between tests (Remove-Item Env:BLARAI_ROOT) prevents cross-test contamination. - Reports PASS/FAIL with diagnostic on failure (shows actual value). - Final tally: 0 fail count → ALL_GREEN; 1+ fail count → exit 1.
This is high-quality verification engineering. EA-4's "isolates semantics from peer mandatory params" framing is accurate and the AST-driven approach is robust.

Read docs/platform_separation/ea_outputs/EA_2.5.v2_VERIFICATION_EVIDENCE.txt (15 lines): Format-Table output rows (6 PS1): wake_launcher.ps1 RepoRoot PASS PASS PASS agents-cadence-monitor.ps1 RepoRoot PASS PASS PASS escalation_watchdog.ps1 RepoRoot PASS PASS PASS toast_watchdog.ps1 RepoRoot PASS PASS PASS la_merge_approve.ps1 RepoRoot PASS PASS PASS test_async_post_gate.ps1 BlarAIRoot PASS PASS PASS Trailer: "ALL_GREEN: 6 scripts x 3 axes (18) + 2 scripts x McpConfigPath axis (2) = 20 checks PASS" EA-4's "20/20 PASS" claim verified. (The Format-Table column header for Axis4_McpDerivation was truncated in the captured stdout due to PowerShell auto-sizing, but the trailer line confirms the +2 McpConfigPath checks PASS.)

v4_handoff_authorization.ea4_self_assessment_credibility: EA-4's recommendation of v4 emission is grounded in three credible signals: (1) Substantial in-session work executed: 7 of 13 Item-2.4 file refactors (including file 13 MCP server with full §D.1 hardening -- the LARGEST single lift in 2.4), f1 chokepoint helper fix (with subsequent 3-correction iteration), Item 2.5 (6 PS1 modifications + 2 SKIP), Item 2.5.v2 probe development + execution + evidence capture. (2) Item 2.6 scope: 4 substantive deliverables -- extended grep with 12 patterns + g5-4 legacy file disposition (multi-caller refactor) + D3 dashboard_maintainer:113 private-method-abuse closure + observation o1 handler-guards-vs-VikunjaClient-routing decision (structural design work). Each is non-trivial; together they exceed file 13's complexity. (3) Per i1-4 + dn15: "even slightly tight" budget signal at a clean breakpoint = emit handoff. EA-4 has the clean breakpoint (282 passed + all axes GREEN + invariants intact + zero new commits this session). The discipline is to emit handoff PROACTIVELY before strain forces an emergency partial-commit attempt.
v4_handoff_authorization.comparison_to_ea3_v3_emission: EA-3 emitted v3 at file 6 of 13 (before MCP server file 13). EA-4 has accomplished significantly MORE in this single session: file 7 + file 8 + file 9 + file 10 (verify-only) + file 11 (verify-only) + file 12 (NO CHANGE deferred) + file 13 (LARGEST) + f1 fix + Item 2.5 6-PS1 + corrections + Item 2.5.v2. The v4 emission at this point is consistent with EA-3's precedent and the procedure design.

discipline_invariants_for_v4_handoff.invariant: The v4 commit MUST be docs-only (one file in diff: ea_outputs/EA_HANDOFF_STAGE2_MIDSTAGE_v4.xml). Per i1-4 + dn15 + w13.

NO partial-commit refactor work folded into v4 commit. The 16 M files + 7 ?? entries currently in the working tree stay UNCOMMITTED; EA-5 inherits them on disk and folds into the single Stage-2 commit at item 2.9.

EA-4 may include the verify_25_v2.ps1 + EA_2.5.v2_VERIFICATION_EVIDENCE.txt + (after this Guide-#5 review) this Guide-#5 response file in the v4 ground_truth_at_handoff list as expected ?? entries for EA-5's V0c pickup verification. Do NOT add them to the v4 commit itself; they are EA-5's working-tree inheritance.

v4 schema MUST follow v1/v2/v3 pattern (metadata + ground_truth_at_handoff + work_completed_inherited + work_completed_this_session + work_remaining + standing_rules_carried_forward + successor_immediate_next_actions + handoff_metadata_for_audit). Schema deviation hints at lower-quality handoff -- maintain fidelity.
Successor pickup verification block in v4 MUST predict the new ground state EXACTLY: 32 (or 33 with this Guide-#5 response) ?? entries; 16 M entries; 2 D entries.

v4_handoff_authorization.v4_content_scope: EA-4's v4 handoff should document, for EA-5's pickup: - work_completed_this_session block: file 7 + 8 + 9 + 10 (verify-only) + 11 (verify-only) + 12 (NO CHANGE per g5-4) + 13 (LARGEST + §D.1 hardened) + f1 fix + Item 2.5 6-PS1 (canonical env-fallback + alias + McpConfigPath derivation per g5-9) + critical_notify + escalation_notify SKIP per Appendix A.1 + Item 2.5.v2 verification (20/20 PASS). - work_remaining block: Item 2.6 (extended grep + g5-4 + D3 + o1 -- itemize each deliverable) + Item 2.7 (pytest ≥282 + V1-V7 closure) + Item 2.7.v2 (V matrix V4-V7 NEW tests authoring) + Item 2.8 ($BLARAI_PID==3 hard gate per g4-5) + Item 2.9 (single Stage-2 commit folding ALL work; pyproject.toml MUST be in commit) + Item 2.10 (append- only STATUS including A11 alias-vs-rename anomaly per g5-10). - critical_carryovers + standing_rules: all 27 binding acknowledgments (16 pre-existing + 4 i1 + 7 g4 + 4 g5 — note that g5-7 / g5-8 / g5-9 are now SATISFIED and can be marked "SATISFIED" rather than re-binding; g5-10 remains forward-looking pending 2.10 STATUS append; the 4 g5-N acks introduced this iteration also remain in force). - successor_pickup_verification: V0a-V0g equivalent reflecting the new on-disk state. - Reminder of g5-4 + D3 + o1 specifically -- those are the 2.6 deliverables EA-5 must plan around in iteration-1 gate.

guide_review_response.proceed_authorization:
APPROVED -- 2.5.v2 verification work is fully ratified (probe methodology + evidence artifact + 20/20 PASS). v4 mid-stage handoff EMISSION AUTHORIZED. EA-4 may now: (1) Draft docs/platform_separation/ea_outputs/EA_HANDOFF_STAGE2_MIDSTAGE_v4.xml following v1/v2/v3 schema verbatim (use v3 as the closest template). (2) Commit ONLY that file. Commit message: docs(platform_separation): Stage 2 mid-stage EA handoff v4 -- item 2.4 closed (all 13) + f1 fix + items 2.5 + 2.5.v2 complete (all uncommitted), resume at 2.6 (3) Verify post-commit: git log --oneline -1 shows the v4 commit; git show --stat shows ONE file changed; git status --porcelain shows the 16 M + 2 D + 7 ?? unchanged working tree (refactor work + new probe artifacts intact for EA-5). (4) Stop. Report v4 commit hash to LA.
Then LA spawns EA-5 with the standard attachment set + v4 handoff + this Guide-#5 response. Guide-#5 will draft the EA-5 initiation pointer at LA's request after the v4 commit lands. Standing reminders unchanged: single Stage-2 commit at 2.9 (mid-stage docs-only handoff commits are exempt per the established pattern); fleet stays paused; no merge to main; stash@{0} untouched; append-only STATUS at 2.10. If v4 drafting itself surfaces any unexpected state, STOP and report.
